name: native-openclaw
description: Multi-provider AI agent CLI — native TypeScript, zero framework lock-in.

scripts.pretest: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.test: node test/session-resume.test.js && node test/zai-provider.test.js && node test/cloudflare-github-models-provider.test.js && node test/provider-model-discovery.test.js && node test/validator.test.js && node test/workspace.test.js && node test/workspace-qa.test.js && node test/api-server.test.js && node test/api-ratelimit-boundary.test.js && node test/web-ui.test.js && node test/telegram.test.js && node test/network.test.js && node test/mcp.test.js && node test/mcp-agent.test.js && node --test test/mcp-phase3-6.test.js && node test/agent-gateway.test.js && node test/external-agent-gateway.test.js && node --test test/phase3-5-stabilization.test.js && node test/gold-workflow.test.js && node test/slash-autocomplete.test.js && node test/reasoning-sanitizer.test.js && node test/tool-alias.test.js && node test/react-loop.test.js && node test/system-execute.test.js && node test/system-execute-security.test.js && node test/command-planner.test.js && node test/reasoning-engine.test.js && node test/prompt-optimizer.test.js && node test/brevo-email.test.js && node test/html-sanitizer.test.js && node test/orchestrator.test.js && node test/semantic-memory.test.js && node test/context-compressor.test.js && node test/browsing.test.js && node test/api-client.test.js && node test/system-time.test.js && node test/providers.test.js && node test/scheduler.test.js && node test/self-improving.test.js && node test/opencode-agent.test.js && node test/restart-notifier.test.js && node test/self-healing.test.js && node --import tsx --test test/orchestrator.test.ts test/tool-loop.test.ts test/router.test.ts
scripts.test:workspace: npm run build && node test/workspace.test.js && node test/workspace-qa.test.js
scripts.test:build: npm run build && npm run test:workspace
scripts.qa:provider-router: node test/cloudflare-github-models-provider.test.js && node test/provider-model-discovery.test.js && node --import tsx --test test/router.test.ts
scripts.qa:phase3.5: npm run build && npm run qa:agent-gateway && npm run qa:provider-router && npm run qa:mcp && npm run qa:security
scripts.qa:phase3.6: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run qa:mcp && npm run qa:phase3.5
